user.description: Adds a service that exports Home Assistant context in AI-friendly format.

abort.already_configured: Only a single HACS AI Export entry is allowed.

generate_context.name: Generate AI Context
generate_context.description: Export selected Home Assistant metadata and states for AI-assisted automation authoring.

sections.name: Sections
sections.description: Pick one or more sections to include in the export.

entity_id.name: Entities
entity_id.description: Optional entity filter. Leave empty to include all entities matching other filters.

label_ids.name: Labels
label_ids.description: Optional label filter for entities, devices, and areas.

domains.name: Domains
domains.description: Optional domain filter, e.g. light, switch, climate.

include_disabled_entities.name: Include Disabled Entities
include_disabled_entities.description: Include disabled registry entities in export output.

create_notification.name: Create Notification
create_notification.description: Show a persistent notification after export generation.
